member.name: T:ProvideSerializeAttributedll.ISerializeDeserializeObject
member.summary: 约束自定义的序列化器:object

member.name: M:ProvideSerializeAttributedll.ISerializeDeserializeObject.SerializeObject(System.Object)
member.summary: 将对象序列化成字符串

member.name: M:ProvideSerializeAttributedll.ISerializeDeserializeObject.DeserializeObject(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: 将字符串逆序列化成指定的对象

member.name: T:ProvideSerializeAttributedll.ProvideSerializeAttribute
member.summary: 为标注的信息指定序列化器

member.name: F:ProvideSerializeAttributedll.ProvideSerializeAttribute.pairs
member.summary: 定义一个字典集合，用来缓存序列化器，相同的序列化器就不需要创建多个实例，节约内存

member.name: M:ProvideSerializeAttributedll.ProvideSerializeAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: 指定序列化类提供者的类型：该类型必须实现了ISerializeDeserializeObject 接口
